### Scores
- Maintainability & Readability: 4 — Schema-first design improves API documentation
- Testability: 3 — Testing tooling is less mature than REST equivalents
- Operability & Observability: 4 — Apollo Studio provides solid observability
- Team Impact: 3 — Significant onboarding cost for unfamiliar team members

### Overall Analysis
The onboarding cost is the most significant sustainability risk. Testing tooling maturity lags behind REST equivalents.

### Verdict
Conditional Approval (Team needs GraphQL training before full adoption)

### Risks and Concerns
- Team onboarding cost may slow initial velocity
- Testing tooling maturity gap compared to REST ecosystem
